name: hungry-flamingo-blog-wordpress-theme
description: A colorful editorial block theme for longform WordPress blogs.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.validate: composer test:php && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run i18n:check && npm run dist && HFB_VERIFY_SKIP_BUILD=1 npm run verify:dist
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
